    Base class for hybrid characters that combine melee/ranged traits.

  • Uses of Character in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters

    Subclasses of Character in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Barista
    Barista hybrid character that throws coffee projectiles with slight arc and knockback.
    class 
    Exorcist
    Exorcist hybrid character using projectile bullets with ammo and reload mechanics.
    class 
    Vampire
    Vampire hybrid melee character with life-steal mechanics.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Hammer
    Hammer melee character with slower but larger hitbox attack.
    class 
    Katana
    Katana melee character with fast two-frame slash animation.
    class 
    Pyro
    Pyro melee character with very fast single-frame strike timing.
